arts.ttl: Manchester United handed triple boost as Joshua Zirkzee makes shock return ahead of Europa League final
arts.sum: Zirkzee was expected to miss the rest of the season with a hamstring injury

arts.ttl: Tottenham's Europa League final squad to face Man Utd confirmed with surprise star included
arts.sum: Tottenham and Manchester United will face off in Wednesday's Europa League final hoping to end their disastrous seasons with silverware, while also earning qualification for next season's Champions League

arts.ttl: Which Europa League finalist has had a worse season: Man United or Spurs?
arts.sum: Man United and Spurs have both had historically bad seasons but, somehow, one of them will win a European trophy and qualify for the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Europa League Final LIVE updates as 'shambolic' Man Utd and Spurs clash slammed
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur are due to face off in the Europa League final at San Mames in Bilbao on Wednesday, with the winner qualifying for the Champions League

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Man United Injury News: 13 Players That Could Miss Europa League Final
arts.sum: Both sides are set to be without some big names.

arts.ttl: 'Goodbye': 'Intelligent' player both Tottenham and Man Utd are pushing to sign announces he’s leaving his club
arts.sum: The immediate futures of Tottenham Hotspur and Manchester United could be dictated by which of the two teams comes out on top in the Europa...

arts.ttl: Manager ‘on the list’ at Tottenham, Chelsea and Manchester United – One thing on his mind right now
arts.sum: Inter Milan manager Simone Inzaghi has impressed once again in the 2024/25 season and is now said to be attracting attention from Chelsea, Manchester United and Tottenham. While the Nerazzurri missed on the Coppa Italia final, they still have a chance of winning Serie A and the Champions League. arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Man United LIVE: Team news and press conference updates before Europa League final
arts.sum: Spurs face Man United in a huge Europa League final, with both teams hoping to secure silverware and qualify for next season’s Champions League with victory at the San Mames in Bilbao

arts.ttl: Why ‘shambolic’ Tottenham v Manchester United final is entirely by Uefa’s design
arts.sum: The Europa League has turned into the biggest safety net possible for wealthy clubs in crisis

arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU name the Tottenham team that beat Man United in 2012? Or pick YOUR team and guess their starting XI
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!
